recent_signals.summary: Director MTech posted about evaluating Claude vs in-house LLM for sales copilot pilots
Announced expanded UK utilities BPM contract with major energy retailer
Open req for Marketing Engineering Lead, Agentic Systems

golden_hooks.angle: Your LinkedIn post on Claude-vs-in-house for the sales copilot maps directly to a question we hear weekly from BPM marketing-tech leaders
Your UK utilities expansion creates a signal-capture problem at scale across outage, billing and digital transformation events
The open Marketing Engineering Lead role suggests you are building this layer in-house rather than buying a platform

recent_signals.summary: Closed $30M Series B led by tier-1 VC
Hired new Head of RevOps from a marketplace unicorn

golden_hooks.angle: Your new RevOps lead's prior playbook at the marketplace likely depended on lead-to-account match rates above 70 percent
Series B capital usually means a 12-month pipeline-coverage target that breaks if SDR meeting rates stay flat
Most D2C Series B teams discover their CRM data quality cannot support the new attribution model the board now asks for

recent_signals.summary: Launched v3 with AI features built on Claude

golden_hooks.angle: Shipping AI features on Claude in production is the part where eval and guardrail debt usually surfaces six weeks later
Most v3-with-AI launches expose a measurement gap that GA4 was not set up to capture
